hero.title: Isuku
hero.lead: IATF ikorera ku mugaragaro. Ingingo z'umushinga, amahinduka y'amategeko, amahindura y'ubutegetsi, n'ibiciro vy'ibikorwa vyandikwa mu bibanza vya bose. Uru rupapuro rurerekana aho buri bwoko bw'inyandiko buba n'ingene wobusoma.

items: Ingingo zijanye n'igikorwa. Ingingo zijanye no kwemera, kuzigama no guhinduranya amabanga zandikwa mu buryo bw'ibisohokayandikiro mu bubiko bujanye n'ico kibazo, zikongera zikagirwa incamake mu cegeranyo c'abantu bose. urwandiko rw'ibangaNiwihe ishusho .

Saba inyandiko. Inyandiko z'ibisabwa ku mugaragaro zibikwa mw'ishirahamwe rya IATF GitHub, kur'uru rubuga, canke kubiri. Inyandiko zishobora gushikiriza incamake, gusubiramwo, canke gutunganya igisabwa c'umwimerere ku buryo ibisabwa vyo kuboneka bishobora gusuzumwa ata makuru y'ibanga adakenewe. Ingingo z'ukutumvikana zirasubirwamwo mu nyandiko y'abanyagihugu igihe zigira ico zikoze ku mugambi canke ku ngingo y'ubutegetsi.
Amajambo y'ibanga arahinduka. Ihindurwa ryose ry'ibwirizwa ry'amategeko rigirwa ku mugaragaro mu bubiko bubereye. Raba IATF Ishirahamwe rya GitHubNiwihe ishusho .
Amahinduka mu bijanye n'ubutegetsi. Ibishasha ku rupapuro rw'ubutegetsi birakurikiranwa nk'ivyiyemeje ku urubuga rwa IATF Nurabe ibibanza vyo kubikuramwo amakuru. gutunganya kahise kuri GitHub.

Ibiciro vyo gukoresha. IATF iguma ikoresha ibiciro biri hasi kandi igashira ku rutonde ibiciro vy'ibikorwaremezo bikoreshwa n'abanyagihugu. Kuva mu mwaka wa 2022, ibiciro bikoreshwa cane ni ivy'amazina y'ibibanza.

Amanota y'ugutunganya ibintu. Ivyanditswe vy'isubiramwo iryo ari ryo ryose canke ingingo iyo ari yo yose ifatiwe hamwe biri kuri GitHub Ibiganiro ku bubiko bujanye n'ico kibazo view Ibiganiro kw'igenekerezo rya urubuga rwa IATF ububiko.

paragraphs: Kuva mu mwaka wa 2022, ibiciro nyamukuru vy'ibikorwa vyama ari amazina y'ibibanza (domain names).
Ico cegeranyo si icegeranyo c'amahera yagenzuwe n'umugwi w'abahinga, ahubwo ni igitabu ca bose cerekana ibiciro vy'ibikoresho bikoreshwa kugira IATF igume ikora.
operatingCosts.footnote: Inyishu z'amakori zirashobora gusubirwamwo canke zisohorwe inyuma y'aho zisubiwemwo. Aderese z'umuntu ku giti ciwe, amakuru ajanye n'ugutanga amatagisi, be n'amakuru y'ikonte adakenewe ntibiri mu vyandikwa ku mugaragaro.

items.label: Ibimenyeshejwe
items.value: Igiciro c'ikibanza gishigikiwe na mugiwarafx. Kubungabunga hakoreshejwe ibikorwaremezo vy'ubuntu canke ibiciro biri hasi biciye kuri Cloudflare. iatf.cc akarere.

items.label: Ibimenyeshejwe
items.value: Ikiguzi c'ikibanza gitangwa na mugiwarafx. Hosting yakoresheje ibikorwaremezo vy'ubuntu canke ibiciro biri hasi biciye kuri Vercel.

items.label: Ibimenyeshejwe
items.value: Ikiguzi c'ikibanza gishigikirwa na mugiwarafx. Hosting yakoresheje ibikorwaremezo vy'ubuntu canke ibiciro biri hasi biciye ku mpapuro za GitHub.

paragraphs: Ibikoresho bimwebimwe ntibija mu bitabu vy'abantu ku mugaragaro ku mvo zikurikira:
items: Ido n'ido ry'abantu bokwicarana n'abagize uwo mugambi.
Amakete y'umuntu ku giti ciwe akoreshwa gusa mu gusigura neza ivyo asabwe imbere y'uko yemerwa, yanka canke ashirwa mu ncamake.
Aderese z'abantu, inomero za telefone, be n'amakuru y'ibanga adakenewe.
Ikintu ico ari co cose gishobora kumenyekanisha umuntu akoresha ubuhinga bwo gufasha atabifitiye uruhusha.
Ibiganiro vya Raw Discord, kiretse ubutumwa bwihariye bwimuriwe n'ibigirankana mu nyandiko y'umushinga rusange.

header.title: Ubutegetsi ni bwo butegeka ivyo vyandikano

paragraphs: Nimba ushaka gutahura ingene imigambi yemerwa, ikabikwa canke igahabwa ahandi, soma urupapuro ruvuga ibijanye n'ubutegetsi.
